import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx");import { Fragment, jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import React, { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  X,
  FileText,
  FileCheck,
  FileSpreadsheet,
  FileCode,
  File,
  ChevronRight,
  ChevronLeft,
  Info,
  Shield,
  AlertCircle,
  CheckCircle,
  Sparkles,
  ListChecks,
  Trash2,
  Edit3,
  Wand2
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import VoiceInput from "/src/app/components/VoiceInput.tsx";
import { DOCUMENT_CATEGORIES } from "/src/app/data/taxonomy.ts";
export function DocumentCreationFlow({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  onComplete,
  existingDocuments
}) {
  _s();
  const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(1);
  const [documentType, setDocumentType] = useState("policy");
  const [creationMode, setCreationMode] = useState("manual");
  const [aiPrompt, setAiPrompt] = useState("");
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [metadata, setMetadata] = useState({
    // Core Identity
    policyId: `POL-${Date.now()}`,
    version: "1.0",
    status: "draft",
    title: "",
    category: "",
    // Document Hierarchy
    parentId: "",
    relationType: "parent",
    // Compliance
    standardMapping: [],
    legislativeRef: "",
    riskRating: "medium",
    // Lifecycle
    reviewFrequency: "12",
    expiryDate: "",
    notificationLeadTime: "30",
    // Access Control
    audienceTags: [],
    privacyLevel: "internal",
    // AI/Template
    isTemplate: false,
    hilRequired: true
  });
  const [content, setContent] = useState("");
  const [procedureSteps, setProcedureSteps] = useState([]);
  const [newStep, setNewStep] = useState({ title: "", description: "", assignedRole: "" });
  if (!isOpen) return null;
  const handleNext = () => {
    if (currentStep === 1 && !documentType) {
      alert("Please select a document type");
      return;
    }
    if (currentStep === 2 && creationMode === "ai" && !aiPrompt.trim()) {
      alert("Please enter a description for AI generation");
      return;
    }
    if (currentStep === 3 && !metadata.title.trim()) {
      alert("Please enter a document title");
      return;
    }
    if (currentStep === 2 && creationMode === "ai") {
      generateAIContent();
    }
    if (currentStep < 5) {
      setCurrentStep(currentStep + 1);
    }
  };
  const handleBack = () => {
    if (currentStep > 1) {
      setCurrentStep(currentStep - 1);
    }
  };
  const generateAIContent = () => {
    setIsGenerating(true);
    setTimeout(() => {
      const typeLabel = documentTypes.find((t) => t.id === documentType)?.label || "Document";
      if (documentType === "procedure") {
        const steps = [
          {
            id: `step-${Date.now()}-1`,
            title: "Initial Assessment",
            description: `Conduct a thorough assessment of the situation related to ${aiPrompt}. Document all relevant details and gather necessary information.`,
            assignedRole: "Team Lead"
          },
          {
            id: `step-${Date.now()}-2`,
            title: "Implementation",
            description: `Execute the required actions for ${aiPrompt} following established protocols and guidelines.`,
            assignedRole: "All Staff"
          },
          {
            id: `step-${Date.now()}-3`,
            title: "Verification",
            description: "Verify that all steps have been completed correctly and document the outcomes.",
            assignedRole: "Supervisor"
          },
          {
            id: `step-${Date.now()}-4`,
            title: "Documentation & Closure",
            description: "Complete all required documentation and close the procedure with appropriate sign-offs.",
            assignedRole: "Compliance Officer"
          }
        ];
        setProcedureSteps(steps);
      } else {
        const generatedContent = `# ${aiPrompt}

## Purpose
This ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} establishes comprehensive guidelines and standards for ${aiPrompt.toLowerCase()} across the organization.

## Scope
This ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} applies to all personnel, including full-time employees, part-time employees, contractors, and temporary workers.

## Policy Statement
The organization is committed to maintaining the highest standards regarding ${aiPrompt.toLowerCase()}. All employees are expected to comply with this ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} and report any concerns or violations.

## Key Principles

### 1. Accountability
All personnel are responsible for understanding and adhering to the requirements outlined in this ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()}.

### 2. Transparency
Clear communication and documentation of all processes related to ${aiPrompt.toLowerCase()} will be maintained.

### 3. Continuous Improvement
This ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} will be regularly reviewed and updated to reflect best practices and regulatory requirements.

## Requirements

### General Requirements
- All staff must complete training on ${aiPrompt.toLowerCase()} within 30 days of employment
- Annual refresher training is mandatory
- Documentation of compliance must be maintained
- Any incidents or concerns must be reported immediately to supervisors

### Specific Requirements
- [Specific requirement 1 related to ${aiPrompt}]
- [Specific requirement 2 related to ${aiPrompt}]
- [Specific requirement 3 related to ${aiPrompt}]

## Roles and Responsibilities

### Management
- Provide resources and support for implementation
- Monitor compliance and address issues
- Conduct regular reviews and updates

### Employees
- Follow all requirements and procedures
- Complete required training
- Report concerns or violations

### Compliance Team
- Monitor adherence to ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()}
- Provide guidance and support
- Conduct audits and assessments

## Compliance and Enforcement
Violations of this ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination of employment. All violations will be investigated thoroughly and documented appropriately.

## Review and Updates
This ${typeLabel.toLowerCase()} will be reviewed annually and updated as needed to reflect changes in regulations, best practices, or organizational requirements.

## References and Related Documents
- [Related Policy 1]
- [Related Procedure 1]
- [Applicable Regulations]

---
*AI-Generated Content - Please review and customize as needed*`;
        setContent(generatedContent);
        setMetadata((prev) => ({
          ...prev,
          title: aiPrompt,
          category: prev.category || "General"
        }));
      }
      setIsGenerating(false);
    }, 2e3);
  };
  const handleAddStep = () => {
    if (!newStep.title.trim()) {
      alert("Please enter a step title");
      return;
    }
    const step = {
      id: `step-${Date.now()}`,
      title: newStep.title,
      description: newStep.description,
      assignedRole: newStep.assignedRole || "All Staff"
    };
    setProcedureSteps([...procedureSteps, step]);
    setNewStep({ title: "", description: "", assignedRole: "" });
  };
  const handleRemoveStep = (stepId) => {
    setProcedureSteps(procedureSteps.filter((s) => s.id !== stepId));
  };
  const handleComplete = () => {
    onComplete({
      id: `doc-${Date.now()}`,
      title: metadata.title,
      type: documentType,
      category: metadata.category,
      version: metadata.version,
      content: documentType === "procedure" ? JSON.stringify(procedureSteps) : content,
      status: metadata.status,
      author: "Current User",
      lastModified: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0],
      requiresAcknowledgement: metadata.audienceTags.length > 0,
      tags: metadata.audienceTags,
      documentType,
      parentId: metadata.parentId || void 0,
      relationType: metadata.relationType
    });
    setCurrentStep(1);
    setDocumentType("policy");
    setCreationMode("manual");
    setAiPrompt("");
    setContent("");
    setProcedureSteps([]);
    setMetadata({
      policyId: `POL-${Date.now()}`,
      version: "1.0",
      status: "draft",
      title: "",
      category: "",
      parentId: "",
      relationType: "parent",
      standardMapping: [],
      legislativeRef: "",
      riskRating: "medium",
      reviewFrequency: "12",
      expiryDate: "",
      notificationLeadTime: "30",
      audienceTags: [],
      privacyLevel: "internal",
      isTemplate: false,
      hilRequired: true
    });
    onClose();
  };
  const documentTypes = [
    {
      id: "policy",
      label: "Policy",
      icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileText, _fgS: "bkax0", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "w-5 h-5", "data-fg-bkax0": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:322:13:9662:32:e:FileText::::::B1i5" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx",
        lineNumber: 342,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this),
      color: "teal",
      subtitle: "WHY - Level 1",
      description: "Defines organizational standards, principles, and strategic direction"
    },
    {
      id: "procedure",
      label: "Procedure",
      icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileCheck, _fgS: "bkax1", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "w-5 h-5", "data-fg-bkax1": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:330:13:9935:33:e:FileCheck::::::k3S" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx",
        lineNumber: 350,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this),
      color: "blue",
      subtitle: "HOW - Level 2",
      description: "Step-by-step instructions for implementing policies"
    },

      label: "Form/Template",
      icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileSpreadsheet, _fgS: "bkax2", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "w-5 h-5", "data-fg-bkax2": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:338:13:10190:39:e:FileSpreadsheet::::::EINS" }, void 0, false, {

      description: "Fillable forms and templates for recording compliance evidence"
    },
    {
      id: "guideline",
      label: "Guideline",
      icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: FileCode, _fgS: "bkax3", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "w-5 h-5", "data-fg-bkax3": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:346:13:10470:32:e:FileCode::::::D8SN" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx",
        lineNumber: 366,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this),
      color: "amber",
      subtitle: "CONTEXT - Level 4",
      description: "Best practices and contextual information"
    },
    {
      id: "other-document",
      label: "Others",
      icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: File, _fgS: "bkax4", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "w-5 h-5", "data-fg-bkax4": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:354:13:10722:28:e:File::::::DEHK" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx",
        lineNumber: 374,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this),
      color: "gray",
      subtitle: "GENERAL",
      description: "Other supporting documents"
    }
  ];
  const availableParents = existingDocuments.filter((doc) => {
    if (documentType === "procedure") return doc.documentType === "policy";
    if (documentType === "form") return doc.documentType === "procedure";
    if (documentType === "guideline") return doc.documentType === "policy" || doc.documentType === "procedure";
    return false;
  });
  const stepTitles = [
    "Select Type",
    "Creation Method",
    "Metadata",
    "Content",
    "Review & Finalize"
  ];
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkax5", _fgB: 1779104383296, _fgD: true, className: "fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4", "data-fg-bkax5": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:377:5:11352:27575:e:div:e:1", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkax6", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "bg-[#0f2832] border border-[#1a3440] rounded-2xl w-full max-w-5xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col", "data-fg-bkax6": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:378:7:11461:27455:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxte", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkax8", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "p-6 border-b border-[#1a3440] flex items-center justify-between", "data-fg-bkax8": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:380:9:11619:598:e:div:ete", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "bkax9", _fgB: 1779104383296, "data-fg-bkax9": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:381:11:11711:246:e:div:ete", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "h2", _fgS: "bkax10", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "text-2xl font-bold text-white", "data-fg-bkax10": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:382:13:11729:70:e:h2:t", children: "Create New Document" }, void 0, false, {

          lineNumber: 402,
          columnNumber: 13
        }, this),
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "p", _fgS: "bkax12", _fgB: 1779104383296, className: "text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1", "data-fg-bkax12": "418.148:655.4:/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx:383:13:11812:128:e:p:txtx", children: [

_s(DocumentCreationFlow, "hf+Qm6ojFQK0h+MAyys4SHG7Aek=");

$RefreshReg$(_c, "DocumentCreationFlow");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/components/DocumentCreationFlow.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
